headline: Has Market Weakness Created A Fresh Opening In ServiceNow (NOW) Stock?
summary: Investors may be wondering if ServiceNow is attractively priced after a tough stretch, or if the recent levels still build in too much optimism. The share price closed at US$103.06, with returns of 2.2% over 30 days, a 30.1% decline year to date, and a 38.5% decline over the last year. These moves may have changed how the market is weighing its potential and its risks. Recent commentary around ServiceNow has focused on its role as a major software platform, ongoing customer adoption, and how...

headline: Vonage Voice AI Tie Up Puts ServiceNow Platform And Valuation In Focus
summary: Vonage has launched a native integration with ServiceNow Voice, bringing enterprise-grade voice and real-time AI directly into ServiceNow workflows. The integration embeds high quality voice data into ServiceNow Customer Service Management and IT Service Management, supporting richer generative AI use cases. The partnership expands ServiceNow's ecosystem integrations and broadens the scope of its AI platform capabilities for enterprise service operations. For investors tracking ServiceNow...

headline: Big Returns From AI Investments Are Here, CFOs Say
summary: Finance chiefs once questioned the returns on investing in artificial intelligence.  Speaking at The Wall Street Journal’s CFO Council Summit in Palo Alto, Calif., finance chiefs from the tech, retail and financial services sectors said their companies are seeing big gains in efficiency and productivity—in some cases worth millions of dollars—from their investments in generative AI.  Nudging employees to embrace AI also has yielded new ideas about how to accomplish time-consuming tasks, CFOs said.
